goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction and should include free wifi
The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
Make sure you get phone number
